name: Krish Lakhani
title: Builder of useful things, clean experiences, and occasional debugging miracles
tagline: I write code that ships, scales, and occasionally tells a joke before coffee.
highlights: Builds responsive interfaces that don't panic on mobile.
Loves turning messy requirements into clean products.
Cares about performance, accessibility, and pixel-level polish.

funFacts: I treat broken builds like crime scenes.
My tabs are organized chaos with excellent intentions.
I benchmark first, optimize second, celebrate third.
